name: calling-all-minds
description: Temple Grandin's 'Calling All Minds: How To Think and Create Like an Inventor' — an executable toolkit for understanding the inventor's mindset through hands-on projects, patent history, visual thinking, and the science behind paper, levers, wood, flight, and optical illusions.
useCase: Learning how inventors think, understanding the history of patents and innovation, building hands-on projects, developing visual thinking skills, and appreciating different kinds of minds on the autism spectrum.
knownRisks: Written for ages 8-12 — some content may feel basic for adults
Some projects require sharp tools or power tools — adult supervision needed
Patent and historical information may be simplified for young readers
Grandin's autism perspective is her personal experience, not universal
